mapper.select: SELECT * FROM SEARCH_KEYWORDS WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY display_order ASC NULLS LAST FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM SEARCH_KEYWORDS WHERE keyword LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND use_yn = 'Y' AND deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT * FROM SEARCH_KEYWORDS WHERE keyword = #{keyword} AND deleted_yn = 'N' FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SEARCH_KEYWORDS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO SEARCH_KEYWORDS ( keyword, category_id, use_yn, display_order, created_at, created_by, deleted_yn ) VALUES ( #{keyword}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{useYn}, #{displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSTIMESTAMP, #{createdBy, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, 'N' )
mapper.update:
UPDATE SEARCH_KEYWORDS
category_id = #{categoryId}, use_yn = #{useYn}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, updated_by = #{updatedBy},
WHERE keyword_id = #{keywordId} AND deleted_yn = 'N'
